creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
generates statistics in HTML output,
	for Apache web server.

Fix: delete all patches and scripts!!
	apply this extra patch.

diff webalizer/Makefile de-webalizer-2.1.5/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: 
	New Release is out.
	Please keep german/webalizer2 for future updates.
